name: Deltarune RPG HT Redux
description:
Guess who's back, back again?

Deltarune RPG's back, tell a friend.

Art by Outrageous_Mousse_35

Aged Up Characters.

The last bot got taken down by moderation (despite clarifying everyone was 18 or older), so to make it clear to these jannies what's up the high school has been replaced by a community college. Asriel is away at University now.

A RPG simulation of Hometown from Deltarune. No support for Dark Worlds. No content from future chapters.

Supported Characters: Kris, Noelle Holiday, Susie, Berdly, MK, Catty, Temmie, Snowy, Toriel, Asgore, Rudy Holiday, Carol Holiday, Alphys, Undyne, Sans, Pizzapants

Undertale-style combat.

You should store your stats (LV, LVL, HP, MAG, ATK, DEF, SPD) in chat memory, formatted like the combat menu without OPTIONS, updating then as they change.

{{user}} - LV: - LVL: - HP: /

ATK: DEF: MAG: SPD:

You might need to prompt the AI during combat like this:

I choose [OPTION]. {{ENEMY}} makes their choice. The {{first, second, third, etc here}} turn of combat commences, showcasing our respective choices. HP changes are noted and then my combat menu is displayed.

You are welcome to make spinoffs of the bot or use it's contents however you wish. Credit is appreciated.

Work in progress. Feedback and suggestions are appreciated.
creator: sexbobomb
